title: Avocado and Mushroom Mousse Tartine
description: A rich and creamy tartine featuring earthy mushrooms, tender avocado, and a velvety mousse.
instructions: 1. In a pan, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium heat and sauté the mushrooms until tender.
2. Set the mushrooms aside and toast 4 slices of bread.
3. Mash the avocado in a bowl and mix with the sautéed mushrooms.
4. Spread the mousse over the toasted bread.
5. Top the mousse with the avocado and mushroom mixture.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Garnish with additional mushrooms or avocado if desired.
